key.name: search-engine
key.description: Search engine to use for web searches (google, duckduckgo, bing)

key.name: panel-position
key.description: Position index in the panel (0 = leftmost)

key.name: panel-box
key.description: Which box to place the widget in (left, center, right)

key.name: usage-history
key.description: JSON object tracking search frequency and recency for predictions

key.name: max-predictions
key.description: Number of predictive suggestions to display (0-5)

key.name: enable-file-search
key.description: Show local file suggestions from Tracker index in search results

key.name: file-search-max-results
key.description: Maximum number of local file suggestions to display (1-15)

key.name: file-search-min-query-length
key.description: Minimum number of typed characters before querying local file suggestions

key.name: file-search-max-depth
key.description: Maximum folder depth to scan for local file suggestions (1-6)

key.name: file-search-max-directories
key.description: Maximum number of directories to scan per query for local file suggestions (10-500)

key.name: enable-weather-search
key.description: Show current weather results for location queries

key.name: weather-units
key.description: Temperature unit for weather search results (fahrenheit or celsius)

key.name: enable-package-search
key.description: Show software package suggestions from GNOME Software provider

key.name: package-search-max-results
key.description: Maximum number of package suggestions to display (1-10)

key.name: search-debounce-ms
key.description: Delay before running search after typing, in milliseconds (50-500)
